entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of crops critical for ensuring food and nutritional security in sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., a legume crop analyzed for seed production viability in Tanzania and Uganda

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where agricultural productivity and rural livelihoods are being improved

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: A country in sub-Saharan Africa where groundnut seed production cost data was collected

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: A country in sub-Saharan Africa where groundnut seed production cost data was collected

entities.name: COST-BENEFIT ANALYSIS
entities.description: An economic framework used to evaluate the viability of different seed production models

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of crop production, which is necessary to sustain rural livelihoods

entities.name: RURAL LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of support for rural populations, dependent on agricultural productivity

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The availability and access to quality food, supported by legume productivity

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL HEALTH
entities.description: The health status derived from adequate nutrition, supported by legume consumption

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of generating quality seeds of improved varieties to increase crop productivity

entities.name: COST STRUCTURE
entities.description: The analysis of expenses associated with producing groundnut seeds

entities.name: GROSS MARGIN
entities.description: The financial return earned by seed producers after deducting production costs

entities.name: VIABILITY
entities.description: The economic feasibility and profitability of seed production for the private sector
